positive: A mystical, highly stylized circular mandala design featuring interwoven geometric patterns and glowing elements. The central focus is a stylized forest scene with silhouette trees, celestial moons, and glowing bioluminescent flora. Use deep sapphire blues, vibrant emerald greens, and accents of ethereal gold. The composition must be perfectly balanced and symmetrical, designed for seamless printing on fabric. The style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau and modern minimalist graphic design, with clean vector lines and strong negative space contrast. Emblematic, printable, high contrast, perfect symmetry.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low resolution, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, messy, poorly rendered, gradients (too many), photorealism, excessive clutter
